title: Santo Ângelo Heavy Rain
lead: Santo Ângelo is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.37, indicating a significant anomaly. The city's weather is at a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Santo Ângelo is causing disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 96% and low wind speed of 4.7 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The city's energy demand is likely to be affected, with a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 12.8 GG and no Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain in Santo Ângelo.
